name: @brainstorm/native-embed
description: Native NAPI-RS embedding addon for Brainstorm — local semantic-search embeddings (fastembed-rs / ONNX Runtime, bge-small-en-v1.5). Isolated from @brainstorm/native so ONNX Runtime never links into the crypto binary. See docs/implementation-plan.md §11.3.

scripts._build:all_doc: Documentation only — the CI matrix (13.1c pattern) cross-compiles per-runner; local cross-compile needs the matching toolchain (cargo-zigbuild / cargo-xwin) per napi-rs --cross-compile. ONNX Runtime linking makes cross-compile heavier than the crypto crate; that packaging work is the deferred 11.3 tail.
scripts.build:all: bun run build:darwin-x64 && bun run build:darwin-arm64 && bun run build:windows-x64 && bun run build:windows-arm64 && bun run build:linux-x64 && bun run build:linux-arm64
